page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ae.8xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9T34 processor running at 3.4 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it features 32 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core, delivering a total of 32 vCPUs. The hardware configuration includes 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on external storage options and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks highlight strong single-core capabilities, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance ranking in the top tier (top 10%). Multi-core performance and memory bandwidth benchmarks, such as large block read-only and write tests, sit in the average tier. However, the instance demonstrates strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and PassMark CPU encryption scores, placing it in the top 25% for these workloads. Cryptographic operations benefit from hardware-accelerated instructions including AES, VAES, and SHA_NI.

From a resource density perspective, the 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio offers balanced cost efficiency for workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources without the premium of memory-optimized configurations. The lack of bundled local storage means storage costs are decoupled, allowing for flexible external disk provisioning. This instance is well-suited for general-purpose workloads, multi-threaded data processing, static web serving, and database operations that do not require local NVMe drives or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ae.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T34 physical cores running at 3.4 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on external storage attachments. Benchmark results show top-tier single-core CPU performance alongside strong multi-threaded decompression and encryption capabilities, placing it in the top 25% for PassMark CPU and memory scores. This hardware profile is optimized for balanced workloads, including database operations, multi-threaded data processing, and general-purpose enterprise applications.

tagline: A balanced x86_64 compute platform featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high-speed networking for general-purpose enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T34 physical cores running at 3.4 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
Top-tier single-core CPU performance and strong cryptographic execution
20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for reliable data transfer

Suited for database operations, multi-threaded processing, and web serving
